claude-security.specialty: Security vulnerabilities, threat model gaps, auth/authz issues, injection risks, sensitive data exposure

claude-design.specialty: System design quality, architectural coherence, interface design, separation of concerns

claude-completeness.specialty: Requirement completeness, missing edge cases, undefined behaviour, gaps in spec coverage

claude-consistency.specialty: Internal consistency between proposal, design, and specs; conflicting requirements; terminology drift

claude-quality.specialty: Code quality, readability, maintainability, adherence to project conventions

claude-error-handling.specialty: Error handling completeness, failure modes, timeout handling, partial failure recovery

claude-test-coverage.specialty: Test coverage gaps, missing edge case tests, untested error paths

codex-peer.specialty: Cross-cutting peer review from an independent model perspective
